parameters.query:
INSERT INTO leads (call_id, caller_name, email, company, appointment_booked, appointment_datetime, cal_booking_id)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6::timestamptz, $7)
ON CONFLICT (call_id) DO UPDATE SET
  caller_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.caller_name, leads.caller_name),
  email = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.email, leads.email),
  company = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.company, leads.company),
  appointment_booked = EXCLUDED.appointment_booked,
  appointment_datetime = EXCLUDED.appointment_datetime,
  cal_booking_id = EXCLUDED.cal_booking_id
